cards.name: 9 of Pentacles
cards.interpretation: rewarded efforts, success, achievement, independence, leisure, material security, self-sufficiency

cards.name: 7 of Wands, reversed
cards.interpretation: giving up, admitting defeat, yielding, lack of self belief, surrender

cards.name: 6 of Pentacles
cards.interpretation: generosity, charity, community, material help, support, sharing, giving and receiving, gratitude
